items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Microsoft Build 2026 发布 Azure Kubernetes Service（AKS）大规模增强，新增裸金属节点、Fleet 管理与 AI 基础设施能力，将 Kubernetes 升级为 AI 训练与推理的一等公民平台。这是 AKS 平台层能力扩展，相对此前托管 K8s 增加裸金属与 AI 工作负载优化。新增 AI 节点 SKU 与 Fleet manager 组件，旧集群需评估节点池迁移。
items.backend_focus: 关注 AKS 新裸金属节点池与 Fleet manager 在 AI 推理服务的部署方式；若现有 AKS 集群承载 LLM 推理负载，评估是否切换到裸金属节点以提升 GPU 利用率；AKS API 端点本身兼容，但 Helm chart 与 nodeSelector 需调整。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，支持在 Apple Silicon 设备上完全本地运行 LLM 与生成式 AI，兼容 PyTorch 转换模型与预优化开源模型。这是 Apple 端侧 AI 框架替代 Core ML 的代际升级，开发者需将 Core ML 集成迁移到 Core AI SDK 才能利用新能力。
items.backend_focus: iOS/macOS 团队需评估将现有 Core ML 模型集成迁移到 Core AI framework；Apple 官方提供 PyTorch 模型转换工具，关注 SDK 版本号与新 API 命名空间；旧 Core ML 代码可保留但新功能只能在 Core AI 中使用。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 发布 Chunk Sidecars 功能，将 CI 验证直接嵌入 AI 编码 Agent 的开发内循环中。这是 CI/CD 与 AI Agent 工作流的集成增强，开发者可在 Agent 编码过程中触发轻量级 CI 校验。这是新增 CI 能力，相对此前仅在 commit/push 阶段触发 lint/test 提前到 AI Agent 实时反馈。
items.backend_focus: CI/CD 团队可在 CircleCI 配置中启用 Chunk Sidecars，并在 AI Agent 工作流（如 Codex/Copilot）配置中接入 sidecar 触发点；现有 pipeline YAML 兼容，但需新增 sidecar 步骤定义与触发回调。

items.title: Anthropic Releases and Temporarily Suspends Claude Fable 5
items.original_summary: On June 9, 2026, Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, a model designed for long-horizon tasks, but it was taken offline shortly after due to a U.S. government export directive. It shares architecture with Claude Mythos 5, supporting extensive token usage. The model includes mandatory data retention requirements, which have affected its deployment with partners like Microsoft. By Andrew Hoblitzell
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 跟进报道：Anthropic 于 2026-06-09 发布 Claude Fable 5（面向长链路任务），后又因美国政府出口管制指令下线。Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 共享架构，支持大规模 token 使用并附强制数据保留要求，影响与 Microsoft 等合作伙伴的部署。这是 Fable 5 完整发布-暂停周期的事件复盘。
items.backend_focus: 确认所有 Claude Fable 5 调用已停用；检查 Microsoft Azure OpenAI 服务中是否仍残留 Fable 5 部署并联系其下线；回退到 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Sonnet 系列，关注后续是否会有非受限版本的 Fable 替代品。

items.title: AI Coding Agents Get a Stack Overflow of Their Own
items.original_summary: Stack Overflow has announced Stack Overflow for Agents, a beta API-first knowledge exchange aimed at AI coding agents rather than human developers. The service is presented as a way to close what the company calls the Ephemeral Intelligence Gap, where agents repeatedly rediscover the same fixes and patterns in isolation instead of sharing them through a common memory. By Matt Saunders
items.chinese_summary: Stack Overflow 发布 Stack Overflow for Agents（beta 版），面向 AI 编码 Agent 的 API 优先知识交换平台，旨在解决 Agent 反复独立发现相同修复模式的「短暂智能鸿沟」。这是知识服务的新接口形态，提供独立 API 端点供 Agent 查询。相对此前面向人类开发者的页面，新增结构化 API-first 接口。
items.backend_focus: 关注 Stack Overflow for Agents 的 beta API 文档与限流策略；若 Agent 工作流需要社区已知解决方案缓存，可在 coding agent 工具链中集成该 API 作为知识检索层；目前 beta 阶段，建议小流量试用并观察 SLA。

items.title: Celebrating 20 Years of InfoQ
items.original_summary: InfoQ celebrates its 20th anniversary. To mark the occasion, we have published a walk-through of the trends InfoQ called early, where they sit on the adoption curve today, and how that curve may evolve over the next decade. By InfoQ
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 庆祝成立 20 周年，回顾早期识别趋势及其采用曲线。这是媒体品牌里程碑公告，与 AI 工程实践无关。无任何技术变更。
items.backend_focus: 无。纯品牌纪念内容，与工程无关，无需任何行动。
